result.stdout:
GitTreeVersion

Usage:
  GitTreeVersion [options] [command]

Options:
  --debug         Output debug information
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  init <path>                      Creates version root [default: .]
  version <path>                   Calculate versions for closest version root [default: .]
  check-changed <path>             Checks if relevant files have changed [default: .]
  analyze <project>                Analyzes dependencies between project
  tree <path>                      Render repository tree [default: .]
  bump <major|minor|patch> <path>  Bump deployable versions [default: .]
  deployable                       Manage deployables

result.stdout:
ls
  List deployables

Usage:
  GitTreeVersion [options] deployable ls [<path>]

Arguments:
  <path>  [default: .]

Options:
  --only-impacted       Only list deployables that were impacted
  --output-versions     Output versions of deployables
  --format <Json|Text>  Output format [default: Text]
  --debug               Output debug information
  -?, -h, --help        Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
version
  Calculate versions for closest version root

Usage:
  GitTreeVersion [options] version [<path>]

Arguments:
  <path>  [default: .]

Options:
  --apply               Apply calculated version to project files
  --skip-backups        Skip backups of projects when applying versions
  --skip-solution-info  Skip SolutionInfo.cs references in .NET projects when applying versions
  --set-build-number    Set version in CI environment
  --debug               Output debug information
  -?, -h, --help        Show help and usage information

  --skip-backups        Skip backups of projects when applying versions
  --skip-solution-info  Skip SolutionInfo.cs references in .NET projects when applying versions
  --set-build-number    Set version in CI environment
  --debug               Output debug information
  -?, -h, --help        Show help and usage information
